rationale: In the citing paper, Ratchford, Lee, and Talukdar (2003) is cited only in a brief limitations/future-research sentence to support the general claim that the Internet affects new-car search. The citation is not used to build hypotheses, define constructs, specify measures, or motivate the paper's distribution-intensity model and estimation strategy. It appears as contextual background alongside another reference rather than playing a distinct analytic role in the study.
